summary: The Prettier check failed because some files are not formatted. The job printed the files that need formatting and exited with a non-zero status.
root_cause: Prettier reported unformatted files and exited with code 1; the output lists packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js and compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts as needing formatting.

evidence.quote: This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
evidence.reason: Shows the job is running a Prettier formatting check.

evidence.quote: Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: Prettier instructs to run the formatting command, indicating files failed the check.
This file is listed by the Prettier script as needing formatting.
This file is listed by the Prettier script as needing formatting.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The Prettier check exited non-zero, causing the CI job to fail.

suggested_fix: Run the suggested formatter: execute yarn prettier-all (or run node ./scripts/prettier/index.js with the formatting command) locally or in CI to format the listed files, commit the changes, and re-run the workflow.
